# Flourishing Psychology & Wellbeing

> Psychological counselling practice based in Zürich, Switzerland, led by Sophie Klose. Specializing in neurodiversity, transitions, and identity.

## Core Services
- [ADHD & Neurodiversity](https://www.sophieklose.com): Executive functioning support and ADHD-specific guidance.
- [Evolving Self](https://www.sophieklose.com): Support for adolescence, parenthood, and career changes.
- [Identity & Wellbeing](https://www.sophieklose.com): Navigating cultural belonging and mental-physical balance.

## About the Practitioner
Sophie Klose holds a Master’s in Counselling (2025) and is a member of the Swiss Association for Counselling (SGFB). Sessions are available in English and French.

## Contact & Booking
- Website: https://www.sophieklose.com
- Location: Zürich, Switzerland
- Professional Profile: [Psychology Today](https://www.psychologytoday.com)
